languages.text: "Будет исполнено! Потребуется время, чтобы корабль подготовили к эксплуатации — я собщу вам, как только "Бессердечный" сможет служить династии".
"It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Будет исполнено! Потребуется время, чтобы корабль подготовили к эксплуатации — я собщу вам, как только "Бессердечный" сможет служить династии".

traits.locale_text: "Will do! Making the ship operational will take some time. I will let you know as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."
"Will do! Making the ship operational will take some time. I will let you know as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."
"It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."
"It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."
"It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."
"It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

languages.text: 「承知しました！この船を稼働させるには少々時間がかかります。ハートレスが王朝に仕える準備が整い次第、すぐにご報告いたします」
languages.original_text: "It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「承知しました！この船を稼働させるには少々時間がかかります。ハートレスが王朝に仕える準備が整い次第、すぐにご報告いたします」

languages.text: "Nasıl isterseniz! Gemiyi çalışır hâle getirmek biraz zaman alacak. Taşkalp hanedana hizmet etmeye hazır olur olmaz sizi haberdar edeceğim."
languages.original_text: "It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl isterseniz! Gemiyi çalışır hâle getirmek biraz zaman alacak. Taşkalp hanedana hizmet etmeye hazır olur olmaz sizi haberdar edeceğim."

languages.text: «¡Así se hará! Tardaremos un tiempo en tener la nave operativa. L{mf|e|a} informaré en cuanto la Desalmada esté lista para servir a la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «¡Así se hará! Tardaremos un tiempo en tener la nave operativa. L{mf|e|a} informaré en cuanto la Desalmada esté lista para servir a la dinastía».

languages.text: “如您所愿！这艘船若要再次恢复运作，恐怕还需要些时间。等无心号做好为王朝服役的准备之后，我会第一时间通知您。”
languages.original_text: "It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “如您所愿！这艘船若要再次恢复运作，恐怕还需要些时间。等无心号做好为王朝服役的准备之后，我会第一时间通知您。”

languages.text: « C'est comme si c'était fait ! La réhabilitation de l'appareil va prendre un certain temps. Je vous préviendrai dès que le Sans-Cœur sera prêt à servir la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « C'est comme si c'était fait ! La réhabilitation de l'appareil va prendre un certain temps. Je vous préviendrai dès que le Sans-Cœur sera prêt à servir la dynastie. »

languages.text: "Wird erledigt! Es wird eine Weile dauern, das Schiff flott zu machen. Ich werde Euch informieren, sobald die Heartless bereit ist, der Dynastie zu dienen."
languages.original_text: "It shall be done! Getting the ship operational will take some time. I will inform you as soon as the Heartless is ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Wird erledigt! Es wird eine Weile dauern, das Schiff flott zu machen. Ich werde Euch informieren, sobald die Heartless bereit ist, der Dynastie zu dienen."
